title: Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions:
Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions!
